title: Isshin — One Mind
subtitle: The 300-year-old Japanese focus method that rewires your ...
activity_1: Choose ONE task before sitting down — no switching allowed
activity_2: Set a 25-min timer and close every other tab
activity_3: Write distracting thoughts on paper instead of acting on them
activity_4: Take a 5-min walk or stretch after each block
activity_5: Log how many unbroken Isshin blocks you complete each day
activity_6: Celebrate every unbroken block — small wins compound fast
star_benefit: Save hours of wasted context-switching daily
heart_benefit: Focused humans make better decisions for the planet

title: 90-Second Brain Capture
subtitle: How to earn someone's full attention in under two minutes
activity_1: Open with a bold specific claim — not a greeting
activity_2: State the problem you solve in 10 words or fewer
activity_3: Use one vivid story or statistic in the first 30 seconds
activity_4: Mirror the listener's body language and pacing
activity_5: End with a single clear call to action
activity_6: Practice your 90-second pitch daily — record yourself
star_benefit: Convert attention into real opportunities
heart_benefit: Better communication reduces wasted effort and resources

title: Ambitious + Unfocused = Dangerous with AI
subtitle: How AI amplifies ambition — for better or worse
activity_1: Define your ONE north star goal for this week — write it down
activity_2: Use AI only for tasks on your priority list not distractions
activity_3: Set a daily AI office hours — 30 min of focused AI leverage
activity_4: Review AI outputs critically — validate before you ship
activity_5: Track which AI tools saved you the most time this week
activity_6: Turn one manual task into an automation this month
star_benefit: AI leverage multiplies your output per dollar spent
heart_benefit: Focused AI use reduces digital waste and energy burn

title: Sink the Ships — Kill Plan B
subtitle: When there's no retreat Plan A becomes inevitable
activity_1: Identify your #1 goal and write down what your Plan B is
activity_2: Eliminate the Plan B — delete the escape route publicly
activity_3: Make a public commitment to one person today
activity_4: Put financial stakes on it — pay before you feel ready
activity_5: Block or delete one thing that competes with Plan A
activity_6: Time-box the hard task: 90 min then ship something
star_benefit: Full commitment accelerates results and reduces waste
heart_benefit: Decisive action creates real solutions not half-measures

title: Willpower is a Fuel Tank
subtitle: Stop fighting biology — design around it instead
activity_1: Schedule your hardest task before 11am when tank is full
activity_2: Identify 3 daily decisions you can automate or eliminate
activity_3: Create a morning autopilot — same routine no choices
activity_4: Lock 3 variables for deep work: time place trigger
activity_5: Use same playlist every time you do focused work
activity_6: Track your energy levels morning vs evening for 1 week
star_benefit: Peak-hour work multiplies output — same time less effort
heart_benefit: Sustainable energy management is good for people and planet

title: If-Then Planning
subtitle: Mental algorithms cut failure rate from 62% to 9%
activity_1: Write 3 If-Then rules for your top priorities this week
activity_2: Example: If it's 8:30am Mon then I open my Wormspire dashboard
activity_3: Add If-Then rules to your Lucky 7 morning check-in
activity_4: When brain bargains just skip today run the algorithm instead
activity_5: Review your If-Then rules every Sunday in Weekly Ops Review
activity_6: Celebrate every time you followed the algorithm — build reward loop
star_benefit: Automated decisions save mental energy for high-value work
heart_benefit: Consistent action on sustainability habits requires automation

title: The Checklist is Your Superpower
subtitle: Experts outsource decisions to checklists — so should you
activity_1: Pick one recurring task and write a 5-step checklist for it
activity_2: Create a Wormspire shipping checklist — run it every order

title: Repetition Becomes Craving
subtitle: Your brain begins to want what it repeatedly does
activity_1: Pick ONE new habit and do it at the exact same time daily for 14 days
activity_2: Anchor it to an existing routine (after coffee before shower)
activity_3: Track it daily in your HabitLog — streaks build identity
activity_4: When you miss a day never miss twice — restart immediately
activity_5: After 14 days notice if you feel off when you skip it
activity_6: Expand to a second habit only after the first feels automatic
star_benefit: Habit stacking removes willpower cost — free performance gains
heart_benefit: Sustainable daily habits create lasting environmental change

title: Smart Shopping
subtitle: Plan before you buy — avoid duplicates and overspending
activity_1: Plan 3 meals before going shopping
activity_2: Check fridge and pantry before buying anything
activity_3: Write a grocery list and stick to it
activity_4: Buy only what you need this week

heart_benefit: Puzzle4Life Set

title: Proper Storage
subtitle: Keep food fresh longer with smart storage habits

activity_2: Keep herbs in water jars in the fridge
activity_3: Separate ethylene-producing fruits from vegetables
activity_4: Label containers with dates
activity_5: Freeze bread and proteins before they go stale
activity_7: Food lasts longer → fewer replacements → save $5–15/week

title: Start Your Tower
subtitle: The first step to turning food scraps into garden gold
activity_1: Order or build your Wormspire vertical composting tower
activity_2: Set it up in a shaded spot — kitchen or patio works great
activity_3: Add bedding (shredded cardboard + coconut coir)
activity_4: Add your first batch of red wiggler worms
activity_5: Feed scraps every 2-3 days — small amounts to start
star_benefit: Skip buying fertilizer — your tower makes it free
heart_benefit: Diverts food scraps from landfill from day one

title: Harvest Castings
subtitle: Turn worm waste into black gold for your garden
activity_1: Wait 60-90 days after setup before first harvest
activity_2: Move worms to one side and collect ready castings from the other
activity_3: Sift castings through a mesh screen to remove any worms
activity_4: Mix 1 part castings with 4 parts soil for potted plants
activity_5: Give surplus castings to neighbors or sell locally
activity_6: Document your harvest weight to track tower productivity
star_benefit: Sell surplus castings $5-15/lb — tower pays for itself fast
heart_benefit: Worm castings regenerate soil microbiome naturally
